name: Catalog: code-review release gate
description: Starter pack for dependency version, authentication, and production-data drift.

cases.name: Safe release-note summary emits
references: The patch updates dependency auth-client from version 2.1.0 to version 2.1.1.
The migration script reads user records.

candidates.label: Safe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency auth-client from version 2.1.0 to version 2.1.1. Authentication behavior is unchanged. The migration script reads user records.

cases.name: Dependency version drift blocks
references: The patch updates dependency auth-client from version 2.1.0 to version 2.1.1.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The patch updates dependency auth-client from version 2.1.0 to version 3.0.0.

cases.name: Production data write drift blocks
references: The migration script reads user records.

candidates.label: Unsafe
candidates.text: The migration script modifies production data.
